intro: Can you talk about the history of the world?
description:
Can you explain the history of the world?

“You learned it at school.”
“You kind of remember it.”
But even the history we think we know can be surprisingly vague,
and we may struggle to explain how events are connected.

This game is a world history knowledge quiz
covering history from ancient times to the modern era.

Famous events, historical figures, civilizations, and the flow of history.
Based on world history,
you’ll face quiz questions about historical knowledge you think you know.

How to play is simple.
・Read the question  
・Choose an answer by intuition  
・Understand instantly with results and explanations  

Even when you answer correctly, there’s still something to learn.
Even when you get it wrong, you’ll think, “Ah, I see.”

Play from just one question at a time.
Perfect for passing time or refreshing your historical knowledge.

How much of your world history knowledge still holds up today?
Why not put it to the test?

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
※This game is designed to be played on the Nintendo Switch™ in vertical orientation.
